steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The claim requires a quotation showing emphasized physical responses—bodily reactions that build tension around an event.

steps.title: Find the passage with emphasized bodily reactions
steps.content:
Choice B repeatedly emphasizes physical responses to the event—”Oh, how my heart jumped” and “Oh, how my heart beat!”—creating suspense through bodily reaction.

Choices A and D simply report events without physical description, and choice C recalls a quiet memory without the immediate physical tension of suspense.

This emphasis on bodily response directly illustrates the claim's identified technique.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
